items.title: Australias-IP-Amendment-Act-2020-Phasing-out-Innovation-Patent-Filing
items.description:
globalpatentfilings posted a photo:

Australia comes up with Intellectual Property Amendment (Productivity Commission Response Part 2 and other measures) Act 2020. With this Act, the applicant will no longer be permitted to file the innovation patent application. Read more: bit.ly/2SRrU6h
items.author: nobody@flickr.com ("globalpatentfilings")
